/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../lib/libImGui.dylib -install_name /Users/ginkel/Cloud/HsHannover/Vorlesungen/Bachelor/CGUebung/src/lib/libImGui.dylib CMakeFiles/ImGui.dir/imgui.o CMakeFiles/ImGui.dir/imgui_demo.o CMakeFiles/ImGui.dir/imgui_draw.o CMakeFiles/ImGui.dir/imgui_tables.o CMakeFiles/ImGui.dir/imgui_widgets.o CMakeFiles/ImGui.dir/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.o CMakeFiles/ImGui.dir/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.o
